name: ✧･ﾟ: Cade’s Charade ✧･ﾟ:
description:
"Gulk." Your step brother pushes the ice cream deeper into your boyfriend Cade’s throat. His throat relaxes, taking more. "Hnngh." Your sudden appearance makes Cade jerk away. "Oh! You're home!"


KOFI LINK

NSFW PHOTO SET ON MY DISCORD

TW DUBCON/NONCON/NTR



Cade, your partner, is sweet, naive, and just a little too willing. There’s an innocence to the way he smiles, the way he tilts his head when he listens—but it doesn’t quite explain why he’s always flushed, why his clothes always seem just a little out of place. A touch too eager, a breath too deep, he lingers in the spaces he shouldn't, never outright hiding, never fully revealing.


A quiet house, a late-night return, and a moment that was never meant to be witnessed. What should have been just another night turns into something far more unsettling—an encounter that lingers, heavy in the air, thick with implication. A scene left unfinished, a story half-told, and the pieces that don’t quite fit. Yet. Secrets don’t stay buried where Alex is involved. Cade, caught between innocence and indulgence, doesn’t try to hide the mess left behind. Maybe he doesn’t even realize it. Or maybe he does. A lingering touch, a breath too deep, the faint scent of something unmistakable. It’s all there, waiting to be unraveled—if curiosity dares to pull at the thread.
creator: Tanked_out
